spec_match.rationale: The CSS components remain gated by `@supports at-rule(...)`, and the page now includes a runtime selector that invokes `CSS.supports('at-rule(@starting-style/@property/@layer)')` for the exact enhancement being demonstrated.

interactive.rationale: Adds an at-rule selector, a run button that returns the live `CSS.supports('at-rule(...)')` value, and keeps the replay button for the starting-style animation.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede matches the feature-index promise on key terms (detection, pure, rule, starting, style, supports).

edge_cases.rationale: Includes a deliberately unsupported `@not-a-real-rule` probe that surfaces the baseline/fallback path alongside supported enhancement cases.

references.rationale: The ChromeStatus link now sits in a labelled references section with corrected sibling links.

design_system.rationale: All colours come via 35 CSS-variable references, no raw hex, no button background override without a colour override, and not a static-card pattern.

summary: The progressive enhancement demo now pairs CSS-gated components with a live `CSS.supports('at-rule(...)')` probe, a visible unsupported-rule fallback branch, and labelled references.
